data_description.name: A friendly name for this Groq account. Use this to identify the API key or billing project.
data_description.api_key: The default Groq API key. Individual services can override this with their own API key.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Groq
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid. Please enter a new API key.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Groq. Please check your network connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid Groq API key. Please enter a valid key.
error.wrong_api_key: Invalid API key. Please enter a valid API key.
error.invalid_url: Invalid URL. Please enter a valid URL.
error.invalid_enabled_features: One or more selected features are not supported.
error.unsupported_reasoning_model: The selected model does not support reasoning options.
error.unsupported_prompt_caching_model: The selected model does not support Groq prompt caching.
error.unsupported_structured_outputs_model: The selected model does not support structured outputs.
error.unknown: Unexpected error validating the API key. Please try again.

data.normalize_audio: Enable loudness for generated audio (uses more CPU)

data_description.name: A friendly name for this text generation service. Home Assistant uses this for Assist and AI task entities.
data_description.api_key: Optional API key for this service. Leave blank to use the integration API key.
data_description.model: The Groq chat model used for text responses, Assist conversations, and data generation tasks.
data_description.system_prompt: Instructions that guide the model. The default matches Home Assistant's AI task prompt.
data_description.temperature: Controls response variation. Lower values are more predictable; higher values are more creative.
data_description.advanced_options: Opens advanced controls for less common Groq chat request options.

data_description.max_tokens: Limits the number of tokens Groq may generate in the response.
data_description.top_p: Alternative sampling control. Lower values restrict generation to more likely tokens.
data_description.stop: One stop sequence per line. Generation stops when any sequence is produced.
data_description.seed: Best-effort deterministic sampling seed for repeatable responses.
data_description.service_tier: Optional Groq processing tier for the request.
data_description.stream: Streams Assist responses into the Home Assistant chat log when supported.
data_description.reasoning_effort: Reasoning budget for supported reasoning models only.
data_description.reasoning_format: How supported reasoning models expose reasoning content.
data_description.include_reasoning: Requests reasoning content on supported models when no reasoning format is set.
data_description.prompt_caching: Enables Groq prompt caching for supported models. Groq applies caching automatically for repeated prefix content.
data_description.structured_outputs: Requests JSON that follows the configured schema when this service is used for data generation.
data_description.schema_name: A short identifier sent to Groq with the schema.
data_description.schema: JSON Schema object sent as response_format.json_schema.schema.
data_description.strict: Uses Groq constrained decoding when the selected model supports strict structured outputs.
data_description.request_body_options: JSON object merged into the chat completion request body. This is the advanced passthrough for every Groq chat-create body option not shown as a dedicated field, including citation_options, compound_custom, disable_tool_validation, documents, exclude_domains, frequency_penalty, function_call, functions, include_domains, logit_bias, logprobs, max_tokens, metadata, n, parallel_tool_calls, presence_penalty, response_format, search_settings, store, stream_options, tool_choice, tools, top_logprobs, and user.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this Speech-to-Text service instance.
data_description.api_key: Optional API key for this service. Leave blank to use the integration API key.
data_description.model: The Groq Whisper model used to transcribe audio.
data_description.language: Optional ISO language code that hints the audio language.

data.name: Name
data.normalize_audio: Enable loudness for generated audio (uses more CPU)

data_description.name: A friendly name for this Text-to-Speech service instance.
data_description.api_key: Optional API key for this service. Leave blank to use the integration API key.
data_description.model: The Groq speech model used to generate audio.
data_description.voice: The voice persona used by the selected speech model.
data_description.response_format: The audio format requested from Groq. Orpheus currently uses WAV.
data_description.vocal_directions: Optional delivery style prepended to speech, such as cheerful or whisper. You can choose a preset or type your own.
data_description.normalize_audio: Converts output to normalized MP3 with ffmpeg for more consistent loudness on small speakers.
data_description.protect_free_tier: Conservatively blocks local requests before built-in Orpheus free-tier limits are exceeded.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this Image Recognition service instance.
data_description.api_key: Optional API key for this service. Leave blank to use the integration API key.
data_description.model: The Groq vision model used to inspect images.
data_description.system_prompt: Optional instructions that guide how image questions are answered.
